name: Chocolate-Walnut Meringues
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F.
2. Beat all ingredients together at high speed for about 1 minute, or process them in a food processor fitted with the metal chopping blade for about 30 seconds. The mixture will be thick as fondant.
3. Roll the mixture on a board dusted with powdered sugar until it is 1/4-inch thick.
4. Cut the meringue into small circles using a 1 1/2-inch cutter dipped in powdered sugar.
5. Reroll scraps and cut as many meringues as possible.
6. Space the meringues about 1 1/2 inches apart on baking sheets dusted with flour.
7. Bake uncovered for 15 minutes.
8. Cool the meringues for about 5 minutes on the baking sheets, then loosen them with a spatula.
9. Transfer to wire racks. Store in airtight containers when cool.
